creator: tariq@cybersurf.net
text:
While probing for hard drive controllers, kernel does not detect any primary or secondary controllers. I am using an Intel 82371AB/EB PCI Bus Master IDE controller with dual fifo.
IRQ 14 I/O = 01F0 Primary
IRQ 15 I/0 = 0170 Secondary
Win98 uses the default settings for the controller as they're being used in the kernel by 'default.' Thus FreeBsd cannot be installed At aLL.
